Revenue and operating profitability face strain amid evolving market conditions.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life shares rose 4% post Q4 results; HSBC retained 'Buy' with ₹690 target.
Morgan Stanley, UBS flag mixed trends; Bernstein notes modest premium growth but strong new business profitability.
news.summary:

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life saw NSE block trade of Rs. 85.8 crore.
1,514,601 shares traded at Rs. 566.25 per share in the deal.

news.title:
Investec retains Buy on ICICI Prudential Life, cutting TP to ₹685 from ₹720 due to undemanding valuation.
Q4 VNB beat by 9% driven by APE growth, margin expansion; growth challenges may persist.
news.summary:
Investec retains Buy on ICICI Prudential Life, cutting TP to ₹685 from ₹720 due to undemanding valuation.
Q4 VNB beat by 9% driven by APE growth, margin expansion; growth challenges may persist.

news.title:
Bernstein retains Market Perform for ICICI Prudential Life Insurance with a target of ₹700, citing strong Q4 profit, margin expansion.
Factors include mix shift, operational efficiencies, and yield curve; modest topline momentum; FY27 guidance absent; Ind AS transition by FY28.
news.summary:
Bernstein retains Market Perform for ICICI Prudential Life Insurance with a target of ₹700, citing strong Q4 profit, margin expansion.
Factors include mix shift, operational efficiencies, and yield curve; modest topline momentum; FY27 guidance absent; Ind AS transition by FY28.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs holds a neutral stance on ICICI Prudential Life.
The firm sets a target price of 600 for the stock.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs holds a neutral stance on ICICI Prudential Life.

news.title:

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life Insurance's PAT rose 57.6% YoY in Q4 to ₹608.8 Cr, dividend ₹1.65/share.
Eimco Elecon PAT fell 57.2% YoY in Q4; ICICI AMC showed strong growth with FY PAT at ₹32,983 Mn.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life Insurance's PAT rose 57.6% YoY in Q4 to ₹608.8 Cr, dividend ₹1.65/share.
Eimco Elecon PAT fell 57.2% YoY in Q4; ICICI AMC showed strong growth with FY PAT at ₹32,983 Mn.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential's Q4 net profit up 57.7% YoY to ₹6.09B.
Q4 revenue increased 17.1% YoY, reaching ₹192B from ₹164B.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential's Q4 net profit up 57.7% YoY to ₹6.09B.
Q4 revenue increased 17.1% YoY, reaching ₹192B from ₹164B.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential's FY26 APE grew 2.2% YoY to ₹106.4bn; VNB rose 10.9% YoY to ₹26.3bn.
PAT surged 34.6% YoY to ₹16bn; margins stable at 24.7%, focusing on balanced growth and tech.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential's FY26 APE grew 2.2% YoY to ₹106.4bn; VNB rose 10.9% YoY to ₹26.3bn.
PAT surged 34.6% YoY to ₹16bn; margins stable at 24.7%, focusing on balanced growth and tech.

news.title:
ICICI Prudential Life approved audited financial results for FY26 and recommended a final dividend of ₹1.65/share.
Board changes include new statutory auditor, stock options granted to employees, and senior management restructuring.
news.summary:
ICICI Prudential Life approved audited financial results for FY26 and recommended a final dividend of ₹1.65/share.
Board changes include new statutory auditor, stock options granted to employees, and senior management restructuring.
